rules: Move: Fail if target in walls or out of bounds.
Melee Attack: 1. Deal damage: floor(floor(hero.atk * atkMult) * (Glass ? 2 : 1)) - (Hardened ? 1 : 0). 2. Hero receives Counter-Damage: floor(enemy.atk * recMult).
Mana Shield: Counter-Damage reduces mana first. If mana > 0 and then becomes <= 0, Rupture triggers.
Rupture Damage: floor(hero.atk * anomMult * (victim_on_conductive ? 2 : 1)) applied to all enemies at Manhattan distance 1 from Hero.
Resonant: If Rupture triggers, Hero takes floor(1 * recMult) HP damage.
Ranged Attack: Target must be Manhattan distance 2-3. Applies hero.corrosion to enemy.corrosion_dot. Deals floor(hero.atk * atkMult) damage.
Corrosion Loop: For each action: For each enemy: Deal floor(corrosion_dot * atkMult) damage -> Subtract 1 from corrosion_dot.
Scenario Transition: When all enemies die: hero.pos = [0,0], currentScenarioIdx++, load next scenario. Persistence: hero stats (hp, mana, atk, corrosion) carry over.
Win/Lose: Win if all enemies in final scenario destroyed. Lose if hero.hp <= 0.

files.description: CLI entry point handling --scenario flag and action loop.
Core game logic, rule enforcement, and state transitions.
State definition and helper functions for state mutation.
